title: Sweet Crisp Saudi Arabian Barley Pilaf
description: A sweet and crispy barley dish originating from Saudi Arabia, perfect for a sick-day meal. This dairy-free-friendly recipe combines the goodness of barley, onions, and spices to create a delicious and comforting meal.
instructions: Rinse the barley and soak it in water for 30 minutes. Drain and set aside.
Heat the oil in the tandoor and sauté the onion and ginger until the onion is translucent.
Add the cumin seeds and sauté for 1 minute.
Add the coriander powder, turmeric powder, and salt. Mix well.
Add the soaked barley to the tandoor and mix well with the spice mixture.
Add the chopped dates and mix well.
Pour in the water and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and cover the tandoor. Simmer for 20 minutes or until the barley is cooked.
Drizzle the pomegranate molasses over the barley and mix well.
Garnish with chopped toasted almonds and serve hot.
